CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`taskId` TEXT NOT NULL, `organizationId` TEXT, `practitionerId` TEXT, `patientId` TEXT, `insuranceInformationId` TEXT, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `medicationId` TEXT, `accidentInfoId` TEXT, `deviceRequestId` TEXT, `multiplePrescriptionId` TEXT, `communicationId` TEXT, `parentProfileId` TEXT, `acceptedUntil` INTEGER, `lastModified` INTEGER, `authoredOn` INTEGER NOT NULL, `expiresOn` INTEGER, `lastMedicationDispense` INTEGER, `accessCode` TEXT NOT NULL, `author` TEXT NOT NULL, `bvg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `coPaymentStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, `dispenseValidityEnd` TEXT NOT NULL, `dosageInstruction` TEXT NOT NULL, `flowType` TEXT NOT NULL, `fullUrl` TEXT NOT NULL, `identifier` TEXT NOT NULL, `noctuFeeWaiver` TEXT NOT NULL, `prescriptionId` TEXT NOT NULL, `redeemedOn` TEXT NOT NULL, `source` TEXT NOT NULL, `substitutionAllowed` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`taskId`), FOREIGN KEY(`organizationId`) REFERENCES `organizations`(`organizationId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL , FOREIGN KEY(`practitionerId`) REFERENCES `practitioner`(`practitionerId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL , FOREIGN KEY(`patientId`) REFERENCES `patient`(`patientId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL , FOREIGN KEY(`multiplePrescriptionId`) REFERENCES `multiple_prescriptions`(`multiplePrescriptionId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL , FOREIGN KEY(`accidentInfoId`) REFERENCES `accident_info`(`accidentInfoId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL , FOREIGN KEY(`deviceRequestId`) REFERENCES `task_med_device_requests`(`deviceRequestId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL , FOREIGN KEY(`medicationId`) REFERENCES `medication`(`medicationId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL , FOREIGN KEY(`communicationId`) REFERENCES `communications`(`communicationId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL )
